creator: moggie@elasticmind.net
text:
Hi, thanks for this. However, the patch seems to make use of a port 
OPTION but doesn't define it? It also seems to error a few times when 
being applied?


On 16/06/2013 15:00, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of www/py-werkzeug,
>
> Please note that PR ports/179615 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>      http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/179615
>
